title: Reduce Phase Components
description: The 'lib/reduce' directory houses Java classes crucial for Hadoop's reduction phase. It includes custom field selection, summing reducers for integers and longs, and a flexible reducer context implementation. These components, leveraging Hadoop's libraries, illustrate the reduction pattern, consolidating Map phase outputs. This directory exemplifies Hadoop's modular design, facilitating tailored data aggregation via custom reducers.
